xfail: Data.String.CodeUnits / Unsafe / CodePoints: purvasm strings are UTF-8, code-point-semantic (ADR-0006); the upstream suite asserts the JS UTF-16 code-unit contract, so this package is the representation-divergent seam (ADR-0040 / ADR-0043 §5) — a JS run is a false signal, hence bespoke, not js
Data.String.Regex replace / replace': not implemented natively (ADR-0081 §2 ledger — undemanded; crashes loudly if reached)
Data.String.Regex search: not implemented natively (ADR-0081 §2 ledger — undemanded)
Data.String.Regex split: not implemented natively (ADR-0081 §2 ledger — undemanded)
Data.String.Regex flags g / i / m / s (global, ignoreCase, dotAll, and parseFlags "g"): rejected at construction — only the u flag (or none) is implemented (ADR-0081 §1)
Data.String.Regex named groups (?<name>...): outside the ADR-0081 floor — rejected at construction
Data.String.Regex class escapes \w \d \s (and boundaries \b): outside the ADR-0081 floor — rejected at construction

Data.String.Common toLower / toUpper: implement exactly Unicode's simple (1:1) Simple_Uppercase_Mapping / Simple_Lowercase_Mapping (UnicodeData.txt fields 12/13, generated by `ulib-tools unicode-gen`, ADR-0101 — see gen/unicode-data.json for the pinned version/sha256) — a code point with no simple mapping in that direction passes through unchanged (e.g. U+00DF ß's only uppercase form is the 2-char SpecialCasing.txt SS), and SpecialCasing.txt's locale-conditional rules (Turkish/Azeri dotted I, Lithuanian dot retention) are out of scope, matching this function's un-parametrized-by-locale signature. Not excluded: U+0130 İ IS correctly mapped to its real simple lowercase U+0069, even though SpecialCasing.txt's full form differs (U+0069 U+0307)
Data.String.Common localeCompare: byte/code-point order (Data.Ord.compareStringImpl), not true CLDR locale collation — undemanded
